info.title: Pyrus API
info.description: Pyrus is a platform for real-time messaging, task management, and workflow automation. The API allows building highly customized integrations in any programming language.

post.description: Obtain a bearer token by providing login credentials and security key.

get.description: Retrieve a simple or form task with all comments.

post.description: Create a simple task or a form-based task.

post.summary: Add a comment to a task
post.description: Add a comment, change status, reassign, or update form fields on a task.

get.description: Returns a description of all forms in which the current user is a manager or member.
Returns a description of the form with the specified ID.
Returns the list of tasks created based on the specified form.

parameters.name: item_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

get.description: Retrieve the list of user permissions for the form.

post.description: Change user access rights for the form.

get.description: Returns all catalogs without their elements.

put.description: Create a new catalog with headers and items.

get.description: Returns a catalog with all its elements.

post.description: Sync catalog data. All unspecified items and text columns will be deleted.
Modify catalog items via upsert and delete operations.
Upload a file for subsequent attachment to tasks. Maximum file size is 2 GB.

get.description: Returns a list of contacts available to the current user grouped by organization.
Returns a list of all participants of the organization.

post.description: Add a user to the organization.

get.description: Retrieve employee information and profile details.

delete.description: Block a user from the organization.

get.description: Returns all the lists that are available to the user.

post.description: Change list name and manage members and administrators.

get.description: Returns all the tasks in the specified list.

post.description: Add a comment to an announcement. Returns the announcement with all comments including the new one.

get.description: Returns all inbox tasks, including tasks organized into groups.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token obtained via the /auth endpoint

person_id.description: Required if multiple accounts share the same email

form_id.description: Form template ID for form tasks
